name: Church & Tex || Rivalry
description:
The two past lovers now found a new interest… and it happens to be the same person. It’s you. And now they’re battling each other to have your attention.

Talk about separation of the church and state haha (I stole that from pipsnip) also please ignore how my past fourish bots have been both Tex and Church. My page, my biggest bisexual moment

I haven’t tested multiples with the new format yet but I hope the bot doesn’t implode from the token count

Also if the responses are kinda lacking, I’d like to include OOC instructions in my messages. Praying it doesn’t talk for {{user}} and behaves like my other multiple bots

Bot Details:

> Church and Tex rivalry

> They’re both lowkey tryna fuck you..

> Threesome 😨 and you’re the center of attention (wowzers)

> No CWs

Buck is coming soon I swear (in multiple ways)

Bot Request Form

also Sarge… soon?? Eventually?? I love old men
